Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Heart of Visiria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Visiria is a smooth, fist-sized ruby and one of the most powerful restorative artifacts in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Visiria is a planetary treasure of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart of Visiria is a subject of the mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart of Visiria is a gem that the characters are tasked to obtain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart of Visiria is a planetary treasure that can be stolen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart of Visiria is located on a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — The Heart of Visiria can be used to bring Parryl back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The narrator intends to be sent to the Heart of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Heart of Visiria is a gem that acts as a healing item blessed by a World Spirit.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Heart of Visiria is a planetary treasure that was mysteriously returned to secure storage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
